function.name: document_cleanup
function.description: Identify boilerplate paragraphs in a Crawl4AI raw Markdown document and extract its keywords + key points via a single LLM index-only call. The caller (AutoSurvey workflow) writes the post-cleanup body to clean_md/<doc_id>.md and persists the metadata to summary/doc_<doc_id>.md.

doc_ids.description: Document ids (matching raw_md/<doc_id>.md) to clean. When omitted, all kept documents in index.json are cleaned.

overwrite.description: When true, re-cleans even if clean_md/<doc_id>.md already exists.
